generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A permanent magnet synchronous motor that converts electrical current (I_M) into rotational torque (τ_M) for the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's vertical axis"
]

instance GearTransmissionSystem : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "A multi-stage gearbox system (standard gearbox + cycloidal gearbox) that reduces gear ratio and transmits torque (τ_G) to the output axis with minimal backlash"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "The final stage of the transmission providing precise torque output (τ_out) with positional accuracy ≤0.1 mm and working range ±190° (max speed 75°/s)"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution angular position feedback sensor mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox to reduce backlash and improve positional uncertainty estimation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller capturing real-time data via MQTT for input current (I_M), output angle, and derived parameters (torque, angular velocity, acceleration)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControlDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance TorqueMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorGearboxStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) describing the motor-gearbox composition (Axis → Motor → Gearbox → Cycloidal Gearbox)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction behavior for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction behavior for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing LuGre friction behavior for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motor current (I_M) data stream from CNC controller for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance MotorTorqueDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motor torque (τ_M) data trace from CNC controller for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueMeasurementData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time angular velocity (ω) data trace from CNC controller for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationService
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque parameters (τ_G, τ_out) data trace from CNC controller for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelValidation
]

instance SimulatedFrictionlessOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor/gearbox outputs without friction for comparison with live measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenControlService
]

instance SimulatedFrictionIncludedOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor/gearbox outputs with friction (Coulomb-Viscous/Stribeck/LuGre) for comparison with live measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionParameterDerivation
]

instance PositionalAccuracyTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Positional accuracy trace (≤0.1 mm) comparison between measured and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData, GearboxPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MotionAccuracyMonitoring
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelBasedSoftwareEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling and MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingTool, SimulationEnvironment
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming protocol between sensors, CNC controller, and digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService, LiveDataIntegration
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified framework integrating robot models and operational data via AAS for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelIntegrationService, DataTraceability
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tools for aggregating and displaying live data traces (motor current, torque, velocity) and model outputs"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService, RealTimeMonitoring
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionAnalysis, KineticFrictionAnalysis, ViscousFrictionAnalysis
]

instance ModelDrivenControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated (frictionless vs. friction-included) and measured data to derive friction parameters dynamically"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterDerivation, AdaptiveControlAlgorithm
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of live data (motor current, torque, angular velocity) and model outputs for operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceVisualization, SystemHealthMonitoring
]

instance MultiPhysicsAwarenessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of structural (gearbox/motor) and behavioral (friction) models for continuous multi-physics-aware friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralBehaviorCorrelation, PhysicsBasedFrictionModeling
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of friction losses (static, kinetic, viscous) and their impact on motion accuracy"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic updates to friction models enable adaptive control algorithms for improved robot performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceTriggerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Aggregated data traces (torque/velocity deviations) allow operators to monitor system health and trigger maintenance actions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PositionalAccuracyValidation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation of positional accuracy (≤0.06 mm) between measured and simulated data"
]

instance ControlParameterOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated optimization of control parameters based on friction model updates"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionModelValidation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Post-operation analysis comparing simulated and measured friction models for validation"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time** with:
  - **Data Acquisition Frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, angular velocity) is streamed at **high temporal resolution** (implied by live operational data requirements).
  - **Model Update Rate**: Friction models are dynamically refined during operation, with updates triggered by deviations between simulated and measured data (e.g., via **MQTT** or model-based processing).
  - **Synchronization**: The digital shadow processes data in near-real-time to support **continuous identification** of friction parameters, ensuring alignment with operational demands."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - **Centralized Digital Shadow**: A single, purpose-driven digital shadow for the robot’s first axis, integrating:
    - **Physical System**: The motor-gearbox subsystem with embedded sensors.
    - **Virtual Models**: Structural (SysML) and behavioral (Simulink) models.
    - **Data Processing**: Simulation and calculation models (e.g., friction models) linked to live data via MQTT.
  - **No External DTs**: The scope is limited to the first axis; no horizontal integration with other robots or systems is described."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As Designed (Ideal)**: Structural models (SysML Block Definition Diagrams) describe the robot’s ideal configuration and mechanical components.
  - **As Operated**: Real-time data traces (sensor inputs, derived parameters) are captured during robot operation to detect friction-induced deviations.
  - **Continuous Improvement**: The digital shadow enables **post-operation analysis** of friction models, facilitating iterative updates to control algorithms."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**: Simulation models (e.g., Simulink) are validated against live sensor data to verify friction parameter accuracy.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The digital shadow uses **traceability** (metadata linking data to sources/models) to identify deviations (e.g., friction-induced errors) and validate model outputs.
  - **Verification/Validation**: Continuous comparison of simulated vs. measured data (e.g., torque/velocity traces) ensures model validity during operation.
  - **Parameter Identification**: White-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models are dynamically refined to minimize discrepancies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: For real-time data streaming between sensors, CNC controller, and digital shadow.
  - **SysML Models**: Structured as SysML Block Definition Diagrams (BDD) and Internal Block Diagrams (IBD) for robot subsystem modeling.
  - **Simulink Integration**: Simulation models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous friction) are executed in MathWorks MATLAB Simulink to process data traces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **SysML Standard**: For structural and behavioral modeling of the robot subsystem.
  - **MQTT Standard**: For real-time data communication.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: For integrating robot models and operational data into a unified framework (though specific AAS standards are not detailed)."
]
